mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO relics (relic_code, site_id, site_name, name, type, position_within_site, excavation_area, excavation_unit, era, stratigraphy, structure_description, dimensions, orientation, burial_depth, preservation_status, function_purpose, cultural_features, related_relics, images, drawings, notes, created_by, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{relic.relicCode}'', #{relic.siteId}, #{relic.siteName}, #{relic.name}, #{relic.type}, #{relic.positionWithinSite}, #{relic.excavationArea}, #{relic.excavationUnit}, #{relic.era}, #{relic.stratigraphy}, #{relic.structureDescription}, #{relic.dimensions}, #{relic.orientation}, #{relic.burialDepth}, #{relic.preservationStatus}, #{relic.functionPurpose}, #{relic.culturalFeatures}, #{relic.relatedRelics}, #{relic.images}, #{relic.drawings}, #{relic.notes}, #{relic.createdBy}, #{relic.createTime}, #{relic.updateTime})
